where_to_eat.name: State Library (Café)
where_to_eat.description: A popular cultural destination in Melbourne where visitors can enjoy refreshments while exploring this iconic institution. The library is a must-visit spot mentioned by first-time travelers to Australia.

into_the_wild.name: Brighton Beach
into_the_wild.description: Famous for its iconic colorful bathing boxes, this beach is a distinctive Melbourne attraction. It's a picturesque coastal spot popular with visitors exploring Melbourne's beach culture.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Bourke Street Tram
gram_worthy_spots.description: An iconic Melbourne symbol that has inspired local art and is instantly recognizable to visitors. The tram represents the essence of Melbourne's historic transport system and charming streetscape.

gram_worthy_spots.name: State Library Melbourne
gram_worthy_spots.description: A stunning cultural landmark and architectural gem that serves as a must-visit destination for first-time travelers to Melbourne. The building's interior and exterior are highly photogenic.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes
gram_worthy_spots.description: Colorful and picturesque bathing boxes that are a famous and highly photogenic Melbourne attraction. These iconic structures are a favorite subject for photographers and travelers.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Cranny North
off_the_beaten_path.description: A lesser-known local spot that residents are surprised to discover is closer than expected. This hidden gem offers a local perspective on the Melbourne area.
